endpoints.name: Send a JSON-RPC call to a localhost neblio-Qt or nebliod node
endpoints.description: Call any Neblio RPC command from the Neblio API libraries. Useful for signing transactions with a local node and other functions. Will not work from a browser due to CORS restrictions. Requires a node to be running locally at 127.0.0.1
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEBL_USERNAME}} with your NEBL USERNAME. Replace {{NEBL_PASSWORD}} with your NEBL PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: Returns address object
endpoints.description: Returns NEBL address object containing information on a specific address
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEBL_USERNAME}} with your NEBL USERNAME. Replace {{NEBL_PASSWORD}} with your NEBL PASSWORD. Replace {{ADDRESS}} with a real address.

endpoints.name: Returns address balance in sats
endpoints.description: Returns NEBL address balance in satoshis
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEBL_USERNAME}} with your NEBL USERNAME. Replace {{NEBL_PASSWORD}} with your NEBL PASSWORD. Replace {{ADDRESS}} with a real address.

endpoints.name: Returns total received by address in sats
endpoints.description: Returns total NEBL received by address in satoshis
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEBL_USERNAME}} with your NEBL USERNAME. Replace {{NEBL_PASSWORD}} with your NEBL PASSWORD. Replace {{ADDRESS}} with a real address.

endpoints.name: Returns total sent by address in sats
endpoints.description: Returns total NEBL sent by address in satoshis
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEBL_USERNAME}} with your NEBL USERNAME. Replace {{NEBL_PASSWORD}} with your NEBL PASSWORD. Replace {{ADDRESS}} with a real address.

endpoints.name: Returns address unconfirmed balance in sats
endpoints.description: Returns NEBL address unconfirmed balance in satoshis
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEBL_USERNAME}} with your NEBL USERNAME. Replace {{NEBL_PASSWORD}} with your NEBL PASSWORD. Replace {{ADDRESS}} with a real address.

endpoints.name: Returns all UTXOs at a given address
endpoints.description: Returns information on each Unspent Transaction Output contained at an address
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEBL_USERNAME}} with your NEBL USERNAME. Replace {{NEBL_PASSWORD}} with your NEBL PASSWORD. Replace {{ADDRESS}} with a real address.

endpoints.name: Returns block hash of block
endpoints.description: Returns the block hash of a block at a given block index
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEBL_USERNAME}} with your NEBL USERNAME. Replace {{NEBL_PASSWORD}} with your NEBL PASSWORD. Replace {{BLOCKINDEX}} with a real blockindex.

endpoints.name: Returns information regarding a Neblio block
endpoints.description: Returns blockchain data for a given block based upon the block hash
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEBL_USERNAME}} with your NEBL USERNAME. Replace {{NEBL_PASSWORD}} with your NEBL PASSWORD. Replace {{BLOCKHASH}} with a real blockhash.

endpoints.name: Returns raw transaction hex
endpoints.description: Returns raw transaction hex representing a NEBL transaction
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEBL_USERNAME}} with your NEBL USERNAME. Replace {{NEBL_PASSWORD}} with your NEBL PASSWORD. Replace {{TXID}} with a real txid.

endpoints.name: Utility API for calling several blockchain node functions
endpoints.description: Utility API for calling several blockchain node functions - getInfo, getDifficulty, getBestBlockHash, getLastBlockHash
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEBL_USERNAME}} with your NEBL USERNAME. Replace {{NEBL_PASSWORD}} with your NEBL PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: Get node sync status
endpoints.description: Returns information on the node's sync progress
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEBL_USERNAME}} with your NEBL USERNAME. Replace {{NEBL_PASSWORD}} with your NEBL PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: Broadcasts a signed raw transaction to the network (not NTP1 specific)
endpoints.description: Broadcasts a signed raw transaction to the network. If successful returns the txid of the broadcast trasnaction.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEBL_USERNAME}} with your NEBL USERNAME. Replace {{NEBL_PASSWORD}} with your NEBL PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: Returns transaction object
endpoints.description: Returns NEBL transaction object representing a NEBL transaction
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEBL_USERNAME}} with your NEBL USERNAME. Replace {{NEBL_PASSWORD}} with your NEBL PASSWORD. Replace {{TXID}} with a real txid.

endpoints.name: Get transactions by block or address
endpoints.description: Returns all transactions by block or address
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEBL_USERNAME}} with your NEBL USERNAME. Replace {{NEBL_PASSWORD}} with your NEBL PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: Information On a Neblio Address
endpoints.description: Returns both NEBL and NTP1 token UTXOs held at the given address.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEBL_USERNAME}} with your NEBL USERNAME. Replace {{NEBL_PASSWORD}} with your NEBL PASSWORD. Replace {{ADDRESS}} with a real address.

endpoints.name: Broadcasts a signed raw transaction to the network
endpoints.description: Broadcasts a signed raw transaction to the network. If successful returns the txid of the broadcast trasnaction.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEBL_USERNAME}} with your NEBL USERNAME. Replace {{NEBL_PASSWORD}} with your NEBL PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: Builds a transaction that burns an NTP1 Token
endpoints.description: Builds an unsigned raw transaction that burns an NTP1 token on the Neblio blockchain.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEBL_USERNAME}} with your NEBL USERNAME. Replace {{NEBL_PASSWORD}} with your NEBL PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: Builds a transaction that issues a new NTP1 Token
endpoints.description: Builds an unsigned raw transaction that issues a new NTP1 token on the Neblio blockchain.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEBL_USERNAME}} with your NEBL USERNAME. Replace {{NEBL_PASSWORD}} with your NEBL PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: Builds a transaction that sends an NTP1 Token
endpoints.description: Builds an unsigned raw transaction that sends an NTP1 token on the Neblio blockchain.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEBL_USERNAME}} with your NEBL USERNAME. Replace {{NEBL_PASSWORD}} with your NEBL PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: Get Addresses Holding a Token
endpoints.description: Returns the the the addresses holding a token and how many tokens are held
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEBL_USERNAME}} with your NEBL USERNAME. Replace {{NEBL_PASSWORD}} with your NEBL PASSWORD. Replace {{TOKENID}} with a real tokenid.

endpoints.name: Returns the tokenId representing a token
endpoints.description: Translates a token symbol to a tokenId if a token exists with that symbol on the network
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEBL_USERNAME}} with your NEBL USERNAME. Replace {{NEBL_PASSWORD}} with your NEBL PASSWORD. Replace {{TOKENSYMBOL}} with a real tokensymbol.

endpoints.name: Get Metadata of Token
endpoints.description: Returns the metadata associated with a token.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEBL_USERNAME}} with your NEBL USERNAME. Replace {{NEBL_PASSWORD}} with your NEBL PASSWORD. Replace {{TOKENID}} with a real tokenid.

endpoints.name: Get UTXO Metadata of Token
endpoints.description: Returns the metadata associated with a token for that specific utxo instead of the issuance transaction.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEBL_USERNAME}} with your NEBL USERNAME. Replace {{NEBL_PASSWORD}} with your NEBL PASSWORD. Replace {{TOKENID}} with a real tokenid. Replace {{UTXO}} with a real utxo.

endpoints.name: Information On an NTP1 Transaction
endpoints.description: Returns detailed information regarding an NTP1 transaction.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEBL_USERNAME}} with your NEBL USERNAME. Replace {{NEBL_PASSWORD}} with your NEBL PASSWORD. Replace {{TXID}} with a real txid.

endpoints.name: Withdraws testnet NEBL to the specified address
endpoints.description: Withdraw testnet NEBL to your Neblio Testnet address. By default amount is 1500000000 or 15 NEBL and has a max of 50 NEBL. Only 2 withdrawals allowed per 24 hour period.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEBL_USERNAME}} with your NEBL USERNAME. Replace {{NEBL_PASSWORD}} with your NEBL PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: Returns address object
endpoints.description: Returns NEBL address object containing information on a specific address
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NEBL_USERNAME}} with your NEBL USERNAME. Replace {{NEBL_PASSWORD}} with your NEBL PASSWORD. Replace {{ADDRESS}} with a real address.
